title: Final review of epic vuq diff
description: Orchestrator meta-tick: review the epic's full diff (git diff epic/idc...HEAD) for correctness, spec compliance against each child tick, and agent-drift patterns. Special attention: no dangling references to deleted packages, kept packages (wave.go planning, worktree, context, gc, config) intact, board still builds and serves tracker views. Owned by the orchestrator.
closed_reason: Completed: frontier-tier review over -38.8k/+1.1k diff — 1 blocker (board port probe broken on macOS wildcard-bind; fixed via bind-first listener + server.WithListener), 5 should-fix (server failure path, stranded run-event API, schema prune, README board/cloud sections, pre-existing tk context dispatch bug) and 7 nits — all fixed except two accepted (wave.MaxWidth dead helper, wildcard-bind hardening deferred); dispatch-coverage test now guards the cobra/switch dual-registration class permanently
